title: I have to choose one of ITCS 4156, ITCS 3216, ITCS 4152, or INFO 3236 to finish my degree. Any recommendations?
author: flameboy22
body: I have to choose one of ITCS 4156 w/ Zhang, ITCS 3216 w/ Mark Faust, ITCS 4152 w/ Srijan Das, or INFO 3236 w/ Oscar Hidalgo or Brad Williams to finish my degree. Any recommendations from those that have taken any of the courses listed? I would prefer to take the easiest class possible to make my last semester not too stressful.

comments.author: nmcassa
comments.body:
ITCS 4156 w/ Zhang was confusing but not too hard (still hard)

ITCS 4152 w/ Das is hard, very tough

comments.author: flameboy22
comments.body: Ok good I registered for 4156 this morning
